name: Bitcoin
description: First decentralized cryptocurrency and blockchain network using proof-of-work consensus.

name: Ethereum
description: Leading smart contract platform using proof-of-stake, supporting DeFi, NFTs, and dApps.

name: Solana
description: High-performance L1 blockchain optimized for speed and low transaction costs.

name: BNB Chain
description: EVM-compatible blockchain ecosystem created by Binance for DeFi and dApps.

name: Avalanche
description: L1 blockchain platform with subnet architecture for customizable, high-throughput networks.

name: Polkadot
description: Multi-chain protocol enabling cross-chain interoperability through parachains and relay chain.

name: Cosmos
description: Ecosystem of interconnected blockchains using IBC protocol for cross-chain communication.

name: Cardano
description: Research-driven L1 blockchain using Ouroboros proof-of-stake and eUTXO model.

name: Near Protocol
description: Sharded L1 blockchain with account abstraction and developer-friendly environment.

name: Aptos
description: L1 blockchain using Move language, built by former Meta Diem team members.

name: Sui
description: L1 blockchain using Move language with object-centric data model for parallel execution.

name: TON
description: L1 blockchain integrated with Telegram messenger, supporting payments and dApps.

name: Tron
description: L1 blockchain dominant in stablecoin transfers, particularly USDT on emerging markets.

name: Algorand
description: Pure proof-of-stake L1 blockchain focused on institutional adoption and real-world assets.

name: Fantom
description: EVM-compatible L1 blockchain transitioning to Sonic upgrade for higher throughput.

name: Hedera
description: Enterprise-grade distributed ledger using hashgraph consensus, governed by global council.

name: Kaspa
description: Proof-of-work blockchain using GHOSTDAG protocol for high block rates and fast confirmations.

name: Sei
description: L1 blockchain optimized for trading with parallelized EVM and built-in order matching.

name: Celestia
description: Modular data availability layer enabling rollups to post data separately from execution.

name: Monad
description: Upcoming EVM-compatible L1 with parallel execution targeting 10,000 TPS throughput.

name: Berachain
description: EVM-compatible L1 using proof-of-liquidity consensus mechanism for capital efficiency.

name: Injective
description: Cosmos-based L1 blockchain optimized for DeFi applications and financial primitives.

name: MultiversX
description: Sharded L1 blockchain formerly known as Elrond, focused on scalability and usability.

name: Tezos
description: Self-amending L1 blockchain with on-chain governance and formal verification capabilities.

name: Internet Computer (ICP)
description: Dfinity's blockchain network hosting smart contracts and web applications directly on-chain.

name: Filecoin
description: Decentralized storage network allowing users to rent unused hard drive space.

name: Arweave
description: Permanent data storage protocol using blockweave technology for one-time payment archival.

name: Arbitrum

name: Optimism

name: Base
description: Coinbase's Ethereum L2 built on the OP Stack, focused on onboarding mainstream users.

name: zkSync Era

name: StarkNet
description: Ethereum L2 using STARK proofs and Cairo language for zero-knowledge scaling.

name: Polygon zkEVM

name: Polygon PoS

name: Scroll

name: Linea

name: Mantle

name: Blast

name: Mode

name: Manta Pacific

name: Taiko
